# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: example-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: example
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: example
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: example-container
        image: example-image:latest
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: direct-access-service
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: direct-access
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: direct-access
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: direct-access-container
        image: direct-access-image:latest
